title: Marcus Hears Sunday Morning
synopsis: Baby Marcus discovers all the wonderful sounds of a cozy Sunday morning with his family, from sizzling pancakes to rustling newspapers.

pages.text: Marcus wakes up to Sunday morning sounds. The sun shines through his window.

illustration.description: Marcus, a boy with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes, stretching in his crib as golden morning light streams through the window. Sunday morning light fills the nursery with a gentle, unhurried glow.
illustration.alt: Marcus waking up in his sunny nursery

pages.text: Sizzle, sizzle! Mama makes pancakes in the kitchen. Pop, pop, pop!

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes, being carried by his mother in matching family pajamas toward the sunlit kitchen where pancakes sizzle on the griddle. Sunday morning light creates a warm domestic scene.
illustration.alt: Marcus and Mama heading to the kitchen with pancakes cooking

pages.text: Rustle, rustle! Papa reads the newspaper. Flip, flip go the pages.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes, sitting on Papa's lap in family pajamas as Papa reads newspapers. Golden hour light filters through windows in their modern diverse family living room.
illustration.alt: Marcus sitting with Papa reading the newspaper

pages.text: Giggle, giggle! Sister plays peek-a-boo. Marcus claps his hands - clap, clap!

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes, clapping his hands while his sister plays peek-a-boo. They're in matching family pajamas in a sunlit room with gentle unhurried Sunday morning atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Marcus clapping while playing with his sister

pages.text: Purr, purr goes the sleepy cat. Tick, tock says the clock. Sunday sounds are everywhere!

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes, surrounded by his modern diverse family in their sunlit living room. A cat purrs nearby and a clock ticks on the wall. Sunday morning light bathes the warm domestic scene in golden hour glow.
illustration.alt: Marcus with his family enjoying peaceful Sunday morning sounds

metadata.illustrationStyle: Sunday morning light, golden hour, family pajamas, newspapers pancakes, gentle unhurried, modern diverse family, lazy morning, sunlit rooms, warm domestic

questions.question: What sound do the pancakes make?
questions.explanation: The pancakes make a sizzling sound when they cook in the pan!

questions.question: What does Marcus do when he plays?
questions.explanation: Marcus claps his hands - clap, clap - when he plays peek-a-boo!

questions.question: What sound does the cat make?
questions.explanation: The sleepy cat makes a purring sound - purr, purr!
